file, however it 
was permissible for the readmission claim to have occurred in January of the following year. A 
beneficiary is considered to be readmitted when they have an acute inpatient stay with a discharge 
status that is not expired (DSCHRG_STUS=20) or left against medical advice (DSCHRG_STUS not equal to 
07) within 30 days of a previous acute inpatient stay with a discharge status that is also not expired or 
left against medical advice. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: READMISSIONS
